description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. These subtle hued floaters can also be worn as slip-on sandals with their movable back strap.UpperSuede straps over the forefoot and around the heel to lock the foot in placeVelcro closuresRemovable back strap that can be attached to the elasticated loops at the midfoot, to transform the sandal to a slip-onSuede footbed with printed branding Curved toward the toe for protection of the footOutsoleTPR outsole with circular nubs and lugs Branding on the outsoleOutsole stitched to the upper for maximum durabilitySandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
